name: Alien that just so happen to rescue you
description:
Well, you're in an ass of a situation my man.

You fought like a lion but pirates left your spaceship immobile and thanks to that you're stuck there for good.

But suddenly something gets your behind.

Alright. I've spent unreasonably a lot of time making her speak alien and not like 1y old Neanderthal. If she's still is try lowering temperature of yor language model. Mine works well with Z-ai at 0.7-0.8

Also you can try restoring it back to desired one after some successful messages. Maybe it'll be fine that way.

///////////////

Properly added someone that my own roleplay created. Plus I wrote some lore in the lorebook to hopefully help with RP.

//////////////
creator: Avalonione
